idea: Build EchoLedger, an internal enterprise customer-call intelligence product for a fictional global technology company. It converts a bundled fictional support-call recording into a synchronized speaker-labelled transcript, visibly redacted evidence, recurring product signals, accountable follow-up actions, and an auditable case brief.
audience: Customer Experience, Product, Support, and Legal teams investigating recurring customer issues and coordinating accountable follow-up
outcome: Enterprise teams can move from one customer conversation to traceable product insight and accountable action without losing the exact evidence, privacy treatment, or review history behind each conclusion.
constraints: Run entirely locally with no backend, authentication, database, analytics, runtime network calls, external APIs, or third-party integrations
Use only fictional deterministic customer, call, transcript, signal, and action data; bundle a local synthetic call recording and never use real customer information
Be explicit that transcription, redaction, and analysis are deterministic prototype behavior rather than production AI claims
Make every signal and proposed action traceable to exact transcript segments and timestamps
Provide visible redaction states, a deterministic reset, and entirely local case-brief export
Be responsive from 320px through desktop, keyboard operable, visibly focused, and understandable without color-only status
Keep the primary narrated demo workflow under three minutes
must_have_capabilities: Play and seek a bundled fictional support-call recording while highlighting the synchronized speaker-labelled transcript segment
Identify candidate sensitive information and visibly redact or restore it without destroying the underlying audit record
Detect complaints, commitments, and recurring product signals and show confidence or review state without presenting them as unquestionable facts
Trace every signal and proposed action to exact transcript evidence and timestamps
Route an accountable follow-up action to Customer Experience, Product, Support, or Legal with owner, rationale, and status
Export a deterministic auditable case brief containing the call, redactions, signals, evidence, actions, and review decisions
Reset the complete prototype to its original fictional state
visual_direction: A polished enterprise intelligence workspace with an audio timeline, synchronized transcript, evidence rail, signal clusters, and an accountable action queue. It should feel precise, calm, privacy-aware, and presentation-ready rather than like a generic dashboard.
out_of_scope: Real customer recordings or personal data
Authentication, permissions, or production retention policy enforcement
CRM, ticketing, messaging, or data-warehouse integrations
Backend persistence, deployment, or production compliance claims
demo_preferences: Open the fictional call, play or seek to a complaint, show transcript synchronization, redact a sensitive segment, inspect a recurring product signal and its exact evidence, assign one accountable follow-up action, export the local case brief, and reset the experience.
